title: Seduced and Abandoned
writer: Pietro Germi, Luciano Vincenzoni, Agenore Incrocci
actors: Saro Urzì, Stefania Sandrelli, Aldo Puglisi
plot: A desperate Sicilian man, whose 15-year-old daughter was seduced and impregnated by his older daughter's fiancé, tries to find a way to save the family's honor.
